outputs.project_readiness_digest: Readiness is partial. workflow_status:alpha is ready_with_gap because the source packet is validated but profile calibration remains pending. workflow_status:delta is blocked because an owner decision is missing for release scope. review_gate:beta adds a boundary-review blocker requiring owner confirmation. owner_backlog:gamma records the high-priority ask to confirm the release scope owner. Calibration priority is owner_decision_packet_v0 as next.
outputs.status_rollup: Confirmed fixture statuses: workflow_status:alpha=ready_with_gap; workflow_status:delta=blocked. Assumption: both status refs are included for reporting because they were provided in workflow_status_refs, even though only workflow_status:alpha appears in digest_scope_refs.
outputs.priority_blockers: Primary blockers: review_gate:beta requires owner confirmation for boundary review; workflow_status:delta is blocked by missing owner decision for release scope. No other blockers are stated in the fixture.
outputs.owner_input_queue: High priority owner input: owner_backlog:gamma asks to confirm release scope owner. Follow-up owner decision is also needed for workflow_status:delta release scope blockage.
outputs.next_action_recommendations: 1. Owner confirms release scope owner for owner_backlog:gamma. 2. Owner or designated decision authority resolves the missing release scope decision blocking workflow_status:delta. 3. Boundary reviewer obtains owner confirmation for review_gate:beta. 4. Calibration runner proceeds with owner_decision_packet_v0 after owner inputs are captured.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Public-safe digest only. It reports from bounded synthetic refs and does not mutate, replace, or elevate upstream artifacts. It does not assert private runtime truth, production status, customer impact, credentials, or unstated approvals.

provenance: workflow contract: expected output groups and reporting-layer boundary rules
approved_digest_policy: report only from bounded refs; do not mutate upstream artifacts; separate blocker, owner input, calibration priority, and next action
review_gate_packet_refs: review_gate:beta boundary review needs owner confirmation
owner_backlog_refs: owner_backlog:gamma Confirm release scope owner priority high
gaps: Owner confirmation for boundary review is missing for review_gate:beta.
Release scope owner confirmation is missing for owner_backlog:gamma.
Owner decision for release scope is missing for workflow_status:delta.
Profile calibration remains pending for workflow_status:alpha.
Assumption noted: workflow_status:delta is reported because it appears in workflow_status_refs, although it is not listed in digest_scope_refs.
downstream_handoff: Owner: confirm the release scope owner for owner_backlog:gamma and resolve the release scope decision tied to workflow_status:delta.
Boundary reviewer: use owner confirmation to clear or update review_gate:beta without changing this digest into the source of truth.
Calibration runner: after owner inputs are recorded upstream, continue with owner_decision_packet_v0 as the next calibration priority.
Status curator: keep upstream workflow status packets authoritative; this digest is a read-only rollup.
boundary_review_note: Public-safe synthetic fixture only; no private project facts are introduced.
Read-only reference reporting only; no upstream artifact mutation or replacement is claimed.
No credentials, customer names, production logs, or secret operational details are included.
Owner approval is not inferred; required confirmations remain open until provided upstream.
no_claims: Does not claim boundary review approval.
Does not claim profile calibration is complete.
Does not claim workflow_status:delta is in the explicit digest_scope_refs; it is only present in workflow_status_refs.
Does not establish this digest as the source of truth for workflow state, blockers, owner decisions, or calibration status.
